# Aamrash

> Tree-ripened heritage mangoes from family orchards across Bengal and Maharashtra, hand-packed and shipped within 24 hours of harvest.

Aamrash sells four single-estate mango varieties — Alphonso, Himsagar, Langra, and Kesar — picked when perfectly ripe, with no cold storage, carbide, or middlemen.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Brand story, the four varieties in season, and the harvest calendar.

## Products

- [Alphonso — Premium Crate](/product/alphonso-mangoes-premium-crate): The king of mangoes from Ratnagiri. Tree-ripened, fiberless, intensely floral.
- [Himsagar — Bengal's Finest](/product/himsagar-mangoes-bengals-finest): Custard-soft Bengal mango, honey-sweet with pineapple and citrus notes.
- [Langra — Heritage Harvest](/product/langra-mangoes-heritage-harvest): Green-skinned when ripe, tart-sweet and resinous — a connoisseur's pick.
- [Kesar — Saffron of Fruits](/product/kesar-mangoes-saffron-of-fruits): Amber Junagadh pulp perfumed with saffron, peach, and brown sugar.
